note: Sprint 5.12: adds sandboxed Useful Compute backend adapters v0.1. Keeps placeholder default, adds opt-in local toy backends with backend metadata enforced by replay/governance. No real DFT claim, no wallet access, no network, no automatic payout. New scripts/trinity/useful_compute_backends.py registry exposes placeholder_<task_type> backends (6) plus three sandbox_toy backends (local_python_numeric_v01 for scoring+simulation, local_structure_relaxation_toy_v01, local_dft_toy_v01) all deterministic stdlib-only with honest disclaimers. The worker gains --backend and --allow-experimental-backends flags; placeholder is default and experimental backends are rejected without the explicit opt-in. Result schema bumped to v0.3 with five new required fields (backend_name, backend_version, backend_kind, backend_disclaimer, backend_runtime_seconds; placeholder runtime pinned to 0.0). Pending reward bumped to v0.2 with backend metadata + explicit worker_result_id. Validation schema bumped to v0.2 with accepted_backend_name/version. Replay validator enforces that all matching results share the same (backend_name, backend_version); divergence becomes mismatch with backend_mismatch in the rejection reason. Governance gate adds two new rejection causes (governance_rejected_missing_backend, governance_rejected_backend_mismatch); both are logged into trinity_error_memory. Web console gains a backend column in the task table and three per-kind counters (placeholder/sandbox_toy/real_backend with real_backend pinned to 0 in v0.1). Badge bumped to v0.6. Tests: 56 new across tests/trinity/test_{useful_compute_backends,useful_compute_worker_backends,useful_compute_replay_backend_consistency,trinity_backend_web_console}.py; existing schema tests updated; static safety + no-network checks extended to cover backends.py. Trinity suite 440/440 PASS with materials-engine-private present. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet or wire-format change.
